LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CHERYL COTTERILL; MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT AND TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT; AND FOR SANTIONS. APPEARANCE: DEFENDANT IN PRO PER. THE COURT HEARD ARGUMENT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - MOTION TO QUASH-DENIED. MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT-DENIED. HON.DONALD S. MITCHELL. REPORTER: RHONDA FUNG, CSR #4819

ORDER AMENDED DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ALL FUNDS OBTAINED FROM JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CHECKING ACCOUNT NO. 0

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CHERYL COTTERILL'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT -- PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL PRESENTED AN UNENDORSED COURTESY COPY OF THE OPPOSITION. AT THE TIME OF THE HEARING, THE REGISTER OF ACTIONS DID NOT REFLECT ANY SUCH FILING. INITIALLY THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANT - NO OPPOSITION FILED. HOWEVER, AFTER SESSION CONCLUDED THE COURT WENT BACK ON THE RECORD TO MAKE AN AMENDED RULING. AFTER REVIEWING THE REGISTER OF ACTIONS THIS MATTER WAS ALREADY HEARD ON 8/9/04 BY JUDGE MITCHELL AND DENIED. THEREFORE THE COURT ORDERED THIS MOTION OFF CALENDAR. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-19-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CHERYL COTTERILL MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: Curtis Jacobs, Esq. (925) 969-1900 for plaintiff and opposing party. No other appearances on this matter.
Ruling: Plaintiff's counsel presented an unendorsed courtesy copy of the opposition. At the time of the hearing, the register of actions did not reflect any such filing. Initially the court adopted its tentative ruling: Grant - no opposition filed. However, after session concluded the court went back on the record to make an amended ruling. After reviewing the register of actions this matter was already heard on 8/9/04 by Judge Mitchell and denied. Therefore the court ordered this motion off calendar. 302/REQ/JT) REPORTER: BELDON YEE CSR #2647

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint And To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment; And For Santions
Off Calendar Aug-09-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CHERYL COTTERILL; Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint And To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment; And For Santions

APPEARANCES: CHERYL COTTERILL, 771-6366 PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER. (Defendant represented to the Court that there was no tentative ruling available yesterday at 3pm and did not pick one up until after 4pm. Deft then left a message w/ pltf's counsel around 4:30pm that she would appear at this hearing.)

RULING: The Court heard argument. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - Motion to Quash-DENIED. Motion to set aside default and default judgment-DENIED. (302/DSM/AA) RHONDA FUNG #4819
